agent_assessment.rationale: The text asks for segment QX, and the diagram clearly supplies the needed geometric relationships: EX is a tangent of length 24, DE is a radius of length 7 perpendicular to the tangent, and Q lies on the horizontal line from X through center D to the circle. A human can infer XD from right triangle XDE and then subtract the radius DQ to get QX, so the sample is semantically understandable.
